sql:
select (firstname || ' ' || lastname) as name
from (values ('Albert', 'Carbon'), ('Jon', 'Smith'), ('Bad', 'Imagination')) as b(firstname, lastname)

SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT Composer) AS besteci_sayisi
FROM tracks

SELECT ROUND(AVG(total),2) as ortalama_gelir
FROM invoices

SELECT Name, Milliseconds
FROM tracks
WHERE Milliseconds > 393599

SELECT Name, Milliseconds
FROM tracks
WHERE Milliseconds > (SELECT AVG(Milliseconds) FROM tracks)

SELECT Composer, COUNT(name) AS Song_Count
FROM tracks
WHERE Composer IS NOT NULL
GROUP BY Composer

select playlist_id, track_id, count(*) as duplicate_count
from playlist_track
group by playlist_id, track_id
having count(*) > 1

select 
    sum(case when playlist_id is null then 1 else 0 end) as null_playlist_id,
    sum(case when track_id is null then 1 else 0 end) as null_track_id
from playlist_track

SELECT 
    table_schema,
    table_name,
    table_type,
    
    CASE 
        WHEN table_type = 'BASE TABLE' THEN 'Data Table'
        WHEN table_type = 'VIEW' THEN 'View'
        ELSE table_type
    END AS table_category
FROM information_schema.tables
WHERE table_schema NOT IN ('information_schema', 'pg_catalog', 'sys')  
    AND table_type = 'BASE TABLE'  
ORDER BY table_schema, table_name

SELECT table_name
FROM information_schema.tables
WHERE table_schema = 'public' AND table_type = 'BASE TABLE'

SELECT TABLE_NAME
FROM INFORMATION_SCHEMA.TABLES
WHERE TABLE_TYPE = 'BASE TABLE' AND TABLE_CATALOG = 'Chinook'

SELECT name
FROM sqlite_master
WHERE type = 'table' AND name NOT LIKE 'sqlite_%'

SELECT
    c.relname AS table_name,
    c.reltuples AS approximate_row_count
FROM
    pg_class c
JOIN
    pg_namespace n ON c.relnamespace = n.oid
WHERE
    n.nspname = 'public' AND c.relkind = 'r' 
ORDER BY
    c.relname
SELECT name FROM sqlite_master WHERE type = 'table' AND name NOT LIKE 'sqlite_%'

SELECT 'invoices' AS table_name, COUNT(*) AS row_count FROM "invoices"
UNION ALL
SELECT 'customers', COUNT(*) FROM "customers"
UNION ALL
SELECT 'tracks', COUNT(*) FROM "tracks"

SELECT name 
FROM sqlite_master 
WHERE type='table'

SELECT * FROM albums
WHERE title LIKE '%greatest hits%'

SELECT Name, Composer, Milliseconds
FROM tracks
LIMIT 100

SELECT * FROM albums 
WHERE title LIKE '%greatest hits%'

SELECT title FROM albums 
WHERE title LIKE 'Lost, Season _'
SELECT * FROM invoices WHERE Total BETWEEN 5 AND 14

SELECT Name, Milliseconds
FROM tracks
WHERE Composer IS NULL

SELECT title, Length(title) 
FROM albums 
WHERE Length(title) > 25 
ORDER BY Length(title) DESC

SELECT Name, Composer, Milliseconds
FROM tracks
ORDER BY Milliseconds DESC
LIMIT 15

SELECT DISTINCT City, State, Country
FROM customers
ORDER BY City

SELECT COUNT(*)
FROM customers
WHERE country = 'Canada'

WITH RECURSIVE counter(x) AS (
  SELECT 1
  UNION ALL
  SELECT x + 1 FROM counter WHERE x < 10
)
SELECT x, Random() % 10000
FROM counter

SELECT sql FROM sqlite_master 
WHERE type='table' AND name='Order Details'

SELECT
  type,
  name,
  tbl_name,
  sql
FROM
  sqlite_master
WHERE
  type = 'index'

SELECT * FROM chinook.employees
WHERE Title = 'Sales Support Agent'

FROM sqlite_master 
WHERE type='table'

CREATE TEMP TABLE customers_temp AS SELECT * FROM customers
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM customers_temp WHERE Country = 'USA' AND State IS NULL

SELECT
    COUNT(*) AS total_rows,
    COUNT(Fax) AS non_null_fax_count,
    (COUNT(*) - COUNT(Fax)) AS null_fax_count
FROM
    customers

SELECT
    SUM(CASE WHEN Company IS NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS null_company_count,
    SUM(CASE WHEN Company IS NOT NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS non_null_company_count
FROM
    customers

SELECT COUNT(*) AS null_state_count
FROM customers
WHERE State IS NULL
SELECT * FROM customers WHERE State IS NULL OR State = ''

SELECT
    Name,
    COUNT(*)
FROM
    playlists
GROUP BY
    Name
HAVING
    COUNT(*) > 1
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM customers WHERE Company IS NULL
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM customers WHERE Country = 'USA' AND State IS NULL

        WHEN table_type = 'BASE TABLE' THEN 'Data Table'
        WHEN table_type = 'VIEW' THEN 'View'
        ELSE table_type
    END AS table_category
FROM information_schema.tables
WHERE table_schema NOT IN ('information_schema', 'pg_catalog', 'sys')  
    AND table_type = 'BASE TABLE'  
ORDER BY table_schema, table_name

FROM information_schema.tables
WHERE table_schema = 'public' AND table_type = 'BASE TABLE'

WHERE TABLE_TYPE = 'BASE TABLE' AND TABLE_CATALOG = 'Chinook'

UNION ALL

UNION ALL
SELECT 'tracks', COUNT(*) FROM "tracks"

SELECT
    Name,
    COUNT(*) AS occurrence_count
FROM
    playlists
GROUP BY
    Name
HAVING
    COUNT(*) > 1

CREATE TEMP TABLE customer_contacts AS
SELECT 'John Doe' AS name, 'johndoe@email.com' AS email, 1 AS version
UNION ALL
SELECT 'Jane Smith', 'janesmith@email.com', 1
UNION ALL
SELECT 'John Doe', 'johndoe@email.com', 2 
UNION ALL
SELECT 'Peter Jones', 'peterjones@email.com', 1
UNION ALL
SELECT 'John Doe', 'johndoe@email.com', 3

WITH NumberedContacts AS (
    SELECT
        name,
        email,
        version,
        ROW_NUMBER() OVER(PARTITION BY email ORDER BY version DESC) as rn
    FROM
        customer_contacts
)
SELECT * FROM NumberedContacts

WITH NumberedContacts AS (
    SELECT
        rowid, 
               
        ROW_NUMBER() OVER(PARTITION BY email ORDER BY version DESC) as rn
    FROM
        customer_contacts
)
DELETE FROM customer_contacts
WHERE rowid IN (SELECT rowid FROM NumberedContacts WHERE rn > 1)

SELECT
    *
FROM
    customers
WHERE
    LOWER(Country) = 'usa'

SELECT
    Name,
    REPLACE(Name, 'Sci Fi', 'Science Fiction') AS StandardizedName
FROM
    genres
WHERE
    Name = 'Sci Fi & Fantasy'

SELECT
    Phone,
    REPLACE(Phone, '-', '') AS StandardizedPhone
FROM
    customers
WHERE
    Country = 'USA'
    AND Phone IS NOT NULL
LIMIT 5

SELECT * 
FROM employees
WHERE title LIKE '%Sales%Agent%'

SELECT *
FROM chinook.customers
WHERE country = 'Brazil'

SELECT AVG(total) AS avg_invoice_total
FROM invoices

SELECT
  Name AS artist_name
FROM artists
GROUP BY 1
